Details: Ozone is effective for the oxidation of 17a-ethynyl estradiol (EE2) in drinking water applications and typical CT values. EE2 is oxidized by ozone quickly and at efficiencies of greater than 95% under water treatment conditions. Studies have identified the oxidation products formed during the ozonation of EE2. One study reported the slow reappearance of 0.1-0.2% of the initial EE2 concentration after ozonation.
